author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Single-source guide-shell routing snippets across docs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: guide-shell routing snippets are copied with small variations across README.md:26-34, docs/README.md:7-15, docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md:112-121, AGENTS.md:17-23, and docs/COMMANDS.md:3-11. Each tells agents to install guide-shell and run pm guide topics, but the topic lists differ (skills, sdk, release, --json), making guide-topic changes easy to miss. Existing pm-rjgh includes AGENTS tightening but not the repeated guide-shell snippets across all entrypoints.

One docs entrypoint owns the canonical guide-shell snippet; other pages use short pointers or task-specific single commands; guide topic examples stay aligned with runtime contracts; docs-skills gate passes.

author: codex-dedupe-agent
message: Start docs dedupe for guide-shell routing snippets as part of combined single-source docs PR.

value.author: codex-docs-dedupe-lane
value.text: Evidence from docs/plugin single-source lane (read-only, 2026-05-25): guide-shell routing text is repeated across README.md, docs/README.md, docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md, docs/COMMANDS.md, and AGENTS.md. Current topic drift: README uses guide, quickstart, commands, skills; docs/README uses guide, quickstart, commands, sdk, release and owns the full Guide Topic Map; docs/AGENT_GUIDE uses guide, quickstart, commands, skills, release; docs/COMMANDS uses only commands; AGENTS.md uses generic pm guide <topic>. Recommendation: docs/README.md should be canonical for guide-shell installation and the topic map because it is the docs index and already maps guide topics to primary docs. AGENTS.md and README.md should keep only a short prerequisite plus either `pm guide` or a task-specific one-liner; docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md should route agents to docs/README.md#guide-topic-map for the full topic list and keep only workflows/skills examples if needed; docs/COMMANDS.md should keep only `pm guide commands --depth standard` as task-specific. Smallest edit: remove repeated multi-line topic lists outside docs/README.md and replace with relative links to docs/README.md#guide-topic-map / README-compatible anchors. Validation commands to wire: pnpm quality:docs-skills (it explicitly checks required guide markers and guide topic routing), pnpm build, and focused grep/link check such as rg -n "pm guide|guide-shell" README.md AGENTS.md docs/README.md docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md docs/COMMANDS.md to confirm only docs/README owns the full topic list.
